notes: Spotted enemy tokens open the enemy intent panel in normal map mode.
The selected enemy token receives the inspected state on the tactical map.
The panel action assigns the inspected spotted enemy as the selected brigade focus target.
Mobile-specific QA remains deferred by current project direction.
